title: useCallback
description: Memoize a callback function to prevent unnecessary child re-renders on every parent render.
problemStatement:
Stable functions! Wrap an event handler function inside `useCallback` to ensure the same function instance is passed to child components between renders.

**Requirement:** Provide an empty dependency array `[]`.
hints: `useCallback` is essential when passing functions down to memoized child components.
expectedOutput: A memoized function reference using useCallback
